sizing_rule.note: Modern portfolio theory approach: optimize security weightings (Xi) via Lagrangian multipliers to minimize portfolio variance subject to target return constraint and full investment constraint. No specific optimal_f or kelly_fraction value provided by author.

source_rule_text: Portfolio position sizing is determined by optimizing the percentage weighting of each security to minimize portfolio variance while achieving a target expected return, using Lagrangian multipliers to solve the constrained multivariable optimization problem.
